content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help today!
content.speakerTextCn: 今天太感谢你的帮助了！
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Have a great day!
Glad I could help! Thanks for coming in!
No problem at all! See you next time!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应了感谢
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'welcome', 'help', 'see you next time'

expectedAnswers: You too! Thanks for shopping with us!
Thanks, you too! Have a wonderful day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应了祝福并适当致谢
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语日常道别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'you too', 'thanks', 'bye' 等关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate how helpful you were!
expectedAnswers: It was my pleasure! Hope you love your new things!
Thank you for saying that! Have a lovely day!
I'm happy I could assist you. Come back soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应了高度感谢
语言准确性：语法和用词是否自然准确
表达自然度：是否体现服务人员的专业与热情
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'pleasure', 'helpful', 'come back', 'lovely day' 等场景关键词
